ab: Wa mniq siyaw sapah nami ka sapah pyasan mu, mksa ku kddiyax musa sapah pyasan ka yaku, mksa ku mbrinah sapah uri.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: Uxay so beyhing ka sapah pyasan nami, ini khbaraw bay ka laqi mpuyas, kiya u mkkla nami kana.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: mssli mniq undoba kana ka dlaqi, msupu mppulah psboru mi msupu pprngaw kari.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: Msupu mppulah yami uri ka mptusa, mntna bay so kingal paru tnsapah ka sapah pyasan.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校就像是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: Smksik nami kddiyax ka yami, bliqan nami smksik ka slhayan muyas sapah pyasan.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: Duma sediq u musa smurus wawi bnlingan, duma sediq u musa smksik dxral.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: Sksikun nami uri ka knkana muxi sapah pyasan, msasu qpahun mi mddayaw nami kana, ini bay krutiq kddiyax ka sapah pyasan.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都不髒。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
